case_title: K. MIRANDA. PROP MGR -GRAND SOUTHERN HOTEL VS. KIRSTEN HANSEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF K. MIRANDA. PROP MGR -GRAND SOUTHERN HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT HANSEN, KIRSTEN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
